overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned, derelict medical facility or asylum with graffiti-covered concrete walls and emergency lighting. The player character walks through debris-filled corridors bathed in red emergency lights, encounters a stationary humanoid figure in a doorway, and proceeds into a medical ward with damaged ceiling tiles and bright light sources.

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from white fluorescent to red emergency lighting as the player enters the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the debris-filled room, observing the graffiti and damaged interior

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in blue and black spray paint graffiti and markings
wooden and metal bench pushed against the graffiti wall
illuminated red exit sign mounted above the doorway
temporary metal fencing blocking off a section of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player begins in an abandoned waiting area with graffiti-covered concrete walls and scattered debris. A wooden bench sits against the left wall as the player walks forward, transitioning from white fluorescent lighting to red emergency lighting while approaching a metal fence barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: red-lit corridor with emergency exit signage

events.description: humanoid figure becomes visible standing motionless in the distant doorway

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the red-lit corridor toward the illuminated exit sign and distant doorway

notable_agents.action: standing motionless in the distant doorway, silhouetted against the light beyond

entered.detail: red illuminated light fixture casting crimson glow on the walls

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. The metal fence barrier passes by on the left as the player approaches an exit sign. A mysterious humanoid figure becomes visible standing in the distant doorway ahead, creating a tense atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition to medical storage room

events.description: passing through the doorway into a larger room with medical equipment
player passes the stationary figure on the right side while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway and passing the silent figure while entering the medical room

notable_agents.action: standing silently by the doorway as the player passes by on the left

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units with medical supplies and boxes
hospital bed with metal frame pushed against the right wall
intense white light source visible through the far doorway or window

segments.scene_description: The player passes through the doorway, moving from the red-lit corridor into a medical storage room. A silent humanoid figure stands to the right as the player passes. Medical shelves and a hospital bed become visible while a bright white light source glows intensely in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical ward with damaged ceiling and bright light source

events.description: bright light source becomes dominant, illuminating the room with intense white light

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the medical ward, observing the equipment and approaching the bright light

entered.detail: red and white medical storage cabinets with drawers
missing and broken ceiling tiles exposing the infrastructure above
large window or opening emitting intense white light into the room

segments.scene_description: The player explores a wider medical ward with damaged ceiling tiles and scattered medical equipment. Red cabinets and a medical desk line the left wall while the camera pans slightly toward an intense bright light source emanating from a window or opening at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a derelict medical facility, transitioning from a graffiti-strewn waiting area into a stark, light-filled medical ward. It begins amidst scattered debris and a wooden bench, moving forward as the sterile white fluorescent lighting shifts into an oppressive red emergency glow upon approaching a metal fence. As the camera pushes through the narrow, red-lit corridor, a mysterious humanoid figure emerges in a distant doorway, heightening the tension before the viewer passes through the threshold. The scene then opens into a medical storage room where the silent figure stands to the right, passing by hospital beds and shelves as a bright white light begins to dominate the distance. Finally, the movement expands into a wider ward filled with damaged ceiling tiles and red cabinets, with the camera panning toward an intense, glowing light source emanating from a far opening.
